why: PlantVillage estimated 5–15% label noise from inter-rater studies. Label noise causes PEFT methods to learn incorrect class boundaries, confounding method comparisons.
prerequisite: ResNet-50 (or I-JEPA + linear head) trained with 5-fold cross-validation
steps: 1. Save out-of-fold softmax probabilities: shape (N_train, N_classes) as oof_probabilities.npy
2. Save corresponding integer labels as oof_labels.npy
5. Remove images with CleanLab confidence > 0.9 from training split
6. Log ALL removed images: path, original label, confidence score
7. Re-run baseline on cleaned data — report accuracy delta
